name: Australian United Investment Company Limited
analysis: AUI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 4% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$11.0800, stop A$10.4148, target A$13.0756 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
